textByHashes.4c0624bae902c89addecb2be0f126263d61f76d5: Greetings! What can I do for you?
textByHashes.7b73d69be2025bc92fc3ac65e83fdca7f476ea7d: I'm a shipwright. I supply boats of all kinds to anyone with the money to afford them.
textByHashes.5d99d7924974d127a107d6ad3a20edae5768006c: Sorry, but I don't have any ready for sale right now. I'm sure I will soon, so keep checking back.
textByHashes.4408796bc923e9826b8923f11094b4df18594fa1: I'm afraid I can't help you with that at the moment. You'll have to come back later.
textByHashes.e507a738baf0f359337fa4e8c01902f3d16e989d: Of course! Which one would you like?
textByHashes.7fc042de1f76fd4a783af64f00af53902a9ad07f: Not a problem. Just let me know which boat you want to customise and I'll get things set up for you.
textByHashes.fa491a0babd451a04b7f1baa5d421dfc1ce1c63d: I'm afraid I can't help you with that as you don't have permission to use the docks here.
